title: selaginella scalariformis
intro: Selaginella scalariformis, also known as the scalar-haired spikemoss, is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, a group of small, non-vascular plants that resemble mosses but have vascular tissue. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella scalariformis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Selaginella scalariformis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat a range of health conditions.
